history.note: Research findings approved: research/2026-06-29-agent-tooling-research.md. Covered bash (shell-vs-execFile gap, additive fixes), edit_file (old/new/replace_all unique-match, read-before-edit needs ToolCallContext state — defer), permission seam (3 headless patterns, gate before tool.call in runTools), cancellation (mechanical: signal on ToolCallContext + ExecOptions). 8 open questions handed to engineering; user delegated the permission-surface choice (Q3) to the architect.

Engineering spec approved: engineering/2026-06-29-agent-tooling-engineering.md. All 8 OQs resolved (8 decisions logged): shell?:boolean on ExecOptions; read-before-edit deferred to SDK (known-issues logged); permission seam = injected approvalHandler callback on AgentOptions (Option A); gate in runTools after Zod before tool.call; bash default blanket-allow (opt-in gate); SIGTERM-only abort; context.signal set once per run; exports bashTool/editFileTool/ApprovalDecision/ApprovalHandler from index.ts (types in types/tool.ts to avoid circular import). All changes additive; existing 140 tests unaffected.

Plan approved: plan/implementation-plan.md + 5 task briefs. Order: 01 type+platform foundations (ToolCallContext.signal, ExecOptions.shell?/signal?, NodePlatform.exec shell-vs-split + signal refactor) → 02 bash tool → 03 edit_file tool → 04 permission gate (types in types/tool.ts + gate in runTools; agentLoop wiring deferred to 05) → 05 wiring+exports+integration (capstone). Planner self-review: no forward deps, all 7 §13 deferrals confirmed absent, circular-import guard noted, 20 success criteria mapped.

FEATURE COMPLETE (terminal phase). All 5 tasks done via the dev loop (implement→test→review), each with brief.md + completion.md: 01 type+platform foundations 1b58b86 (2 iters — review caught AbortError exitCode-as-string bug), 02 bash tool 90225a0, 03 edit_file tool 894839a, 04 permission gate e12fdf4, 05 wiring+exports+integration 70bd7b3. Final: 196/196 tests, build+typecheck+lint clean. Core now ships bashTool, editFileTool, approvalHandler permission seam, and end-to-end AbortSignal cancellation; all additive (no breaking changes). Examples gained a Turn-4 tooling demo (e102979). Deferred items logged in known-issues + engineering §13. Follow-up roadmap: docs/project/core-roadmap.md.
